description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and runs a before_script of "bundle install" for every job. Define a variable JEKYLL_ENV set to "production" and two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a job named "test" that executes "bundle exec jekyll build -d test", stores the "test" directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. In the deploy stage add a job named "pages" that runs "bundle exec jekyll build -d public", publishes the "public" directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
